name: Xiaomi Push (Mi Push)
description: Xiaomi Mi Push — push notification service for Xiaomi MIUI devices, essential for reliable delivery on MIUI that restricts FCM.

seo.title: Xiaomi Push (Mi Push) — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Xiaomi Push (Mi Push): Xiaomi Mi Push — push notification service for Xiaomi MIUI devices, essential for reliable delivery on MIUI that restricts FCM.

when_to_use: Reliable push delivery on MIUI devices where FCM is restricted
System-level notification delivery for Chinese Xiaomi devices
Supplementing FCM with Mi Push for Chinese Android market reach

pros: Essential for reliable delivery on MIUI devices
Covers large Xiaomi install base in Asia
cons: Xiaomi devices only — not a push platform
MIUI behavior changes break flows periodically
review.verdict: A required vendor channel for MIUI reliability — route through a provider rather than integrating directly.
review.best_for: Apps with meaningful Xiaomi/MIUI user share
review.not_for: Teams without Chinese or Xiaomi-heavy audiences
